name: Courageous Crimson Chevalier Bradamante
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>紅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぐ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>恋</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>麗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>傑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ブラダマンテ
desc:
(This card is always treated as an "Infernoble Knight" card.)
You can discard this card, then target 1 Warrior monster you control; equip it with 1 Equip Spell from your Deck that can equip to it. When this card, not equipped with an Equip Card, is destroyed by battle with an opponent's monster and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon this card, and if you do, equip that monster your opponent controls to this card. You can only use each effect of "Courageous Crimson Chevalier Bradamante" once per turn.

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
Equips monsters from the opponent's field to itself
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
